generic_rules: Repairs should focus on fixing the reported diagnostic without altering unrelated parts of the model.
Prioritize moving invalid guarantees or bindings from component type annexes to implementation annexes.
Ensure AGREE contracts use valid scalar types (int, real, bool).
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts reside within `annex agree { ... };` blocks.
Use `assign output = expression;` for implementation-level bindings to existing outputs.
Guarantees should relate visible outputs to visible inputs.
anti_patterns: Do not introduce new architecture to resolve AGREE diagnostics.
Avoid placing guarantee statements within implementation annexes.
Do not use subcomponent paths in component type annexes.
